templates.name: How do I exchange?
templates.content: If you wish to exchange your purchase for a different size or style, we recommend simply buying the product you desire (this will ensure the product does not sell out by the time we receive your item back), and you may then return your original purchase to us using this link: https://talentless.attn.tv/adAWPu__z2pA

templates.name: Do your heavyweight hoodies shrink after being washed?
templates.content: Our heavyweight hoodies are pre-washed, so they shouldn't shrink significantly after washing if you properly follow the care instructions. To maintain the size and quality of your hoodie, it's recommended to wash it in cold water, avoid high heat when drying, and follow the care label instructions. However, some minimal shrinkage may occur over time, but it should not be significant.

templates.name: How do I care for the items that I purchased?
templates.content: Each style has special care instructions attached to the garment. We suggest washing every garment on cold and tumble drying on low heat. Please do not iron artwork.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: Yes! To ship internationally, we partner with Global-e. Global-e is a trusted global ecommerce vendor whose solution allows us to provide the best possible user experience to our international customers. Please select the flag icon in the top right corner to see which countries we ship too and select accordingly. This will change the currency on the website. Once you are in checkout, you will see local payment methods and calculations for any appropriate shipping, duties, taxes and other customs fees.

templates.name: Holiday Gift Shop
templates.content: I'd recommend taking a look at our incredible deals in our Holiday Gift Shop for Men here: https://talentless.co/pages/mens-gift-guide and for Women here: https://talentless.co/pages/womens-gift-guide

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 3-5 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, FedEx, or DHL. Once shipped it will take 2-8 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Military / First responder discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't specifically have discounts for that, however would another deal help instead? :)

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free domestic shipping on orders over $150! Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured? Where do you ship from?
templates.content: Our items are made in Mexico, and we ship them from our US warehouse.

templates.name: Scallop tee vs Standard tee
templates.content: Our scallop tees are slightly longer than our premium tees. They feature a U shape at the bottom where the premium tees would usually end, so the length would be approximately 2-3'' longer. The scallop tees also have a wider neck collar, and a looser, more relaxed fit. A great choice if you don't like fitted tees.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/talentless/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/talentless

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-562-296-1808 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don’t currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Our clothes run true to size. Do you mind sharing your height and weight?

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to check if you can cancel or edit your order is to email our support team directly at contact@talentless.co. One of my colleagues will be more than happy to help out!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at contact@talentless.co. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at  contact@talentless.co. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Length of men's premium tees
templates.content: Our men's premium tee size XXL runs about 28-29" length wise, and then it gets 1-2'' shorter each size down.

templates.name: Men's sweatpants length
templates.content: Our sweatpants are about 40-42" in length.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at contact@talentless.co or give us a call at 1-562-296-1808. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://talentless.co/pages/shipping-returns

templates.name: How do I start my return?
templates.content: You can start your return or exchange via our returns portal here: https://talentless.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: What's the difference between the heavyweight and lightweight sweatpants/hoodies?
templates.content: The difference between lightweight and heavyweight sweatpants/hoodies is the weight and thickness of the fabric. The lightweight items are much lighter and thinner for breathable comfort, while the heavyweight items have more of a weighted feel to them.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes?
templates.content: For domestic orders we do ship to PO Boxes.

templates.name: Are the premium tees pre shrunk?
templates.content: Our premium tees are pre-shrunk to help minimize further shrinkage after washing. This ensures that the tees maintain their size and fit even after going through the laundry. However, it's essential to follow the care instructions on the garment's label to help preserve the quality and fit of the tee.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://talentless.co/collections/sale

templates.name: Price Matching / Adjustment
templates.content: We don't offer price matching for previous sales or promotions. Our pricing and promotions are time-sensitive, and once a sale period has concluded, we are unable to honor those previous prices. Hope this addresses your concerns. If you have any more questions, feel free to let me know.
